sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), salary DECIMAL);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, salary) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', 50000.00);
UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.10 WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TRIGGER increase_salary AFTER UPDATE ON employees FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.05 WHERE id = NEW.id; END;
